data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Quiet hours compliance (don't text at 3am)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for quiet hours compliance, yet the evidence does not include any checks or validations related to the timing of SMS messages sent, particularly around the 3am threshold. This constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary checks to confirm compliance were not performed or documented.
gaps: No evidence of validation for quiet hours compliance regarding SMS sending times.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement quiet hours compliance check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that no SMS messages are sent between 12am and 6am.
